negative_cases.why_wrong: Logic Vector Assign Slice: keeps the file compilable but forces the observable output path low, so it can pass include/instance smoke checks while failing the required behavior to When sel is high, y must follow code[2].

Logic Vector Assign Slice: keeps the main operator syntax but collapses the computed value through the wrong condition, so coarse smoke cases may run while boundary and waveform checks for Use logic vectors with continuous assign and slice selection fail.
Logic Vector Assign Slice: introduces incorrect initialization or state bias, so startup and reset-sensitive checks fail while the model still compiles and produces activity.
